# Sebastian Kolbusz — Senior Frontend Engineer

> Personal portfolio and service site for Sebastian Kolbusz, a Senior Frontend Engineer based in Zakopane, Poland, specialising in high-performance Next.js applications, SaaS interfaces, and cinematic web experiences.

## About

Sebastian Kolbusz is a Senior Frontend Engineer with deep expertise in React, Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, and WebGL. He builds fast, polished, and accessible websites and web applications for ambitious brands across Poland and internationally.

Location: Zakopane, Poland
Email: office@kolbusz.xyz

## Services

- **Landing pages** — High-converting, performance-optimised single-page sites
- **Full websites** — Multi-page websites with CMS integration and i18n support
- **Web applications** — Complex SaaS and data-driven React/Next.js applications
- **Hourly consulting** — Frontend architecture, performance audits, and code reviews

## Skills & Technologies

Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, WebGL / Three.js, Lenis (smooth scroll), Zustand, Vitest, Playwright, Vercel, GitHub Actions, PostgreSQL (basic), Figma

## Selected Projects

- **Zakofy** — Custom Tatra Mountain offer platform (Next.js, SSG, performance-focused)
- **Your Krakow Travel** — Consolidated tour discovery platform with structured data and accessibility-first design
- **Wellezza** — Professional salon web presence with 100/100 Lighthouse score and booking integration
- **Billboard Zakopane** — B2B outdoor advertising catalog with interactive map
- **ready2order** — Senior Frontend Engineer role on an enterprise POS SaaS product
